name: Karakuri Showdown Castle
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>風</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雲</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カラクリ<ruby lang="jp"><rb>城</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When a face-up "Karakuri" monster you control selects an opponent's face-up monster as an attack target, you can change the target's battle position. When this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you can select 1 Level 4 or higher "Karakuri" monster in your Graveyard, and Special Summon it.
eff: When a face-up "Karakuri" monster you control selects an opponent's face-up monster as an attack target, you can change the target's battle position. When this face-up card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard, you can select 1 Level 4 or higher "Karakuri" monster in your Graveyard, and Special Summon it.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
